name: castify
description: Make asciinema recordings scriptable. Instead of performing a session live by hand, script every keystroke and pause in a file via a tmux-driven harness — so casts are reproducible, deterministic, and automatable, and so interactive TUIs like fzf can be recorded at all. Includes the recording library, a clean recording prompt, a runnable example, and an end-to-end web-embedding guide.
